title: Section 16
content: The following shall be officers of the University:-- (1) The Chancellor, (2) The Pro-Chancellor, (3) The Vice-Chancellor, 1*** 2* * * * * 3[(3A) The Pro-Vice-Chancellor, if any; 4[ 5[(3B) The Honorary Treasurer;] 6[(3C)] The Registrar; 6[(3D)] The Finance Officer;] 6[(3E)] The Deans of the Faculties; and] 7[(4)] Such other officers as may be declared by the Statutes to be officers of the University.
footnote: 1. The word "and" ins. by Act 11 of 1945, s. 2, omitted by Act 62 of 1951, section 13. 2. Clause (4) which read "The Pro-Vice-Chancellor, and" omitted by Act 11 of 1945, section 2. 3. Ins. by Act 62 of 1951, s. 13 (w.e.f. 3-11-1951). 4. Subs. by Act 34 of 1972, s. 12, for clauses (B) and (C) (w.e.f. 17-6-1972). 5. Ins. by Act 62 of 1981, s. 6 (w.e.f. 10-2-1982). 6. Clauses (3B), (3C) and (3D) renumbered as clauses (3C), (3D) and (3E) thereof by Act 62 of 1981, s. 6 (w.e.f. 10-2-1982). 7. Clause (5) renumbered as clause (4) by Act 11 of 1945, s. 2.
